    def eligible_for_emergency_shelter(self) -> bool:
        # Define eligibility criteria
        income_limit = 15000
        age_limit = 60
        household_size_limit = 3
        
        # Check all conditions
        return (self.annual_income <= income_limit and 
                self.age >= age_limit and 
                self.household_size <= household_size_limit)
